case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROP SUBJ DISP $4,000.00 U.S. CURRENCY et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROP SUBJ DISP $4,000.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100 JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $4,000.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO ERIK BABCOCK ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT QUINETTE KELLEY. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE CASE IS MUTUALLY WAIVES BY BOTH PARTIES - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
